title: [ImportVerilog] `inside` expression only support simple bit vectors
body:
The BlackParrot core in the sv-tests repository is currently failing on the `inside` expression only supporting simple bit vectors. I suspect that this is due to some enum/struct/union being passed to `inside`, which should be converted to a simple bit vector:

https://chipsalliance.github.io/sv-tests-results/?v=circt_verilog+black-parrot+bp_default

```
third_party/cores/black-parrot/bp_me/src/v/cce/bp_uce.sv:290:43: error: only simple bit vectors supported in 'inside' expressions
  wire miss_load_v_li   = cache_req_v_i & cache_req_cast_i.msg_type inside {e_miss_load};
```
code_blocks:
third_party/cores/black-parrot/bp_me/src/v/cce/bp_uce.sv:290:43: error: only simple bit vectors supported in 'inside' expressions
  wire miss_load_v_li   = cache_req_v_i & cache_req_cast_i.msg_type inside {e_miss_load};
